name: agent-collab
description: Unified dynamic-host collaboration package with centralized skills, migration preflight, and a verified plugin-relative native runtime boundary. The signed runtime artifact is intentionally absent until the private build/sign integration completes.

interface.shortDescription: Route collaboration through independent managed model families.
interface.longDescription: Unified collaboration policy, migration checks, and signed-runtime routing for Codex and compatible hosts without provider-specific plugins.
interface.defaultPrompt: Review this with an eligible independent model family.
